description: Payload-binding name collides with a reserved state-child attribute (§51.0.B.1). Done(rule: number) is bound via the parenthesized form <Done(rule) rule=.Idle>; the extracted binding local name `rule` collides with the reserved attribute name `rule`. E-ENGINE-PAYLOAD-RESERVED-COLLISION fires (the §34 error partition); the escape hatch is a non-colliding positional local, e.g. <Done(r)>.
rationale: §51.0.B.1 a payload-binding name colliding with a reserved state-child attribute name (rule/effect/history/internal:rule) SHALL fire E-ENGINE-PAYLOAD-RESERVED-COLLISION.
